title: justicia neurochlamys
intro: Justicia neurochlamys, also known as the yellow justicia, is a plant species native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Justicia neurochlamys include reducing fever and pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
